items.title: Catch us if you can! Man City's dramatic late win ...
items.summary: Manchester City got their WSL title bid back on course with a late, late win over Liverpool that puts them almost out of sight of challengers Arsenal.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: CSK's Ramakrishna Ghosh ruled out of IPL with foot fracture
items.summary: CSK said he sustained the injury against Mumbai Indians in Chennai on Saturday
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Caleb Downs has the top-selling rookie jersey, so far
items.summary: He was the eleventh overall pick in the draft.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
